items.title: Criminally underrated
items.summary: The art is some of the most beautiful pieces I have ever seen, and not even limiting that to games! I’ve only played for twenty-ish days and already have thirty of the characters (not including dupes) and it is so refreshing to be able to get characters without intense grinding. I absolutely fell in love with the art and character designs and recommend this to my friends sooo much!
items.author: CybrrS1g1l1sm

items.title: PEAK
items.summary:
This game is absolutely GEM! If you’re a turn-based game lover, you won’t regret any second spending on it. The art style is remarkably beautiful, game play is addictive, and most importantly, I think it’s F2P friendly. Worth playing.

Cons: Please keep on working on a translation. Especially Thai, it’s too confusing to understand.
items.author: CinematicScenarios
